title: ChoiceCard
description: A curated, bounded set of SelectableItem objects presented to the LLM as a structured menu. The LLM selects from this card rather than an unbounded tool list.

items.description: Ordered list of selectable options. Should contain 3–7 items for practical LLM selection.

context_hint.description: Optional guidance for the LLM about how to interpret this card (e.g., 'Select the most appropriate data retrieval action').
